title: AnimeWitchery
description: A wonderful mod about exploring purpose
body:
Having trouble with warmongers on your server? well look no further! with a slew of support based features and pacifistic,vanilla-balanced mechanics you can finally feel safe at home, no more stray kills for someone elses humor or satisfaction, and if thats not your style then use the support based items to join the fray!

Currently Implimented Features:
Silver Armor, Pickaxe, and Needle,
allowing for pasifistic living through unprecidented ammounts of both weakness and resistance

Planned (or completed and unimplimented) Features:
Paradise Lost Dimension (First build complete, no structures yet),
Effigy Fountain (Currently building,no comment),
containment spell (Allows for the temporary containment of an enemy),
Support Spell Staff (still conceptualizing)
